title: Intriguingly Spicy Egyptian Lamb Biryani
description: A romantic Egyptian dish featuring biryani masala, bonito-shave, and halal-friendly ingredients, with a citrusy and chewy texture, this spicy lamb biryani is sure to intrigue your taste buds. It is a perfect blend of Egyptian and Indian flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the biryani masala, bonito flakes, and lemon juice, and stir well.
Add the basmati rice and stir well to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the saucepan.
Simmer for 20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
